creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text: I also added NO_ARCH, because package doesn't contain any architecture-dependent files and limited python version to 2.x, because it was unable to build it with 3.x (see traceback in commit message). By the way, LICENSE looks like 3-clause BSD, while in port we have BSD3CLAUSE. Should I change it to BSD3CLAUSE in Makefile, or you can update the license in distribution (you are tmuxp author, AFAIK)?
